creator: lwhsu@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Mateusz Piotrowski from comment #3)
Hi Mateusz, thanks for also taking care of the fprint ports, it's really an important feature and we need better support for it to be more useful on modern laptops. I appreciate that you pushed this forward, while I'm still stuck on it.

Look forward, I have a personal WIP at https://github.com/lwhsu/freebsd-ports/tree/bug280749 to integrate the patches Daniel submitted for the ports tree. One of the things I'm stuck with is that security/fprintd 1.94.4 seem not buildable on 14 in poudriere (but 15 is fine). I just tested the latest ports tree and the issue seems still existing:

https://gist.github.com/lwhsu/ec8a4051e545275a7834939454370f45

Can you also help checking this?
